context_apis.description: Canonical occupancy endpoint backed by privacy-bounded camera-derived occupancy context.
limitations: Anonymous occupancy only.
No persistent identity.

context_apis.description: Camera-specific occupancy estimate from anonymous detections.
limitations: Estimated occupancy only.

context_apis.description: Derived entry events from doorway camera tracks.
limitations: Identity unavailable.

context_apis.description: Derived exit events from doorway camera tracks.
limitations: Identity unavailable.

context_apis.description: Identity-free track continuity for visible camera intervals.
limitations: No identity persistence outside visible track continuity.

context_apis.description: Coarse motion event summaries from camera detections.
limitations: Motion summaries only; no intent inference.

context_apis.description: Coarse posture or low-floor event candidates from the room camera.
limitations: Candidate-level only; not a diagnosis.

context_apis.description: Low-risk placement, orientation, coverage, and blind-spot metadata.
limitations: Describes coverage only; does not answer the user query directly.

context_apis.description: Canonical audio endpoint backed by derived microphone summaries.
limitations: No raw audio.
No speaker identity.
No unrestricted transcription.

context_apis.description: Canonical room-state summary synthesized from the currently available camera and microphone derived packets.
limitations: Summary only; no identity, transcript, or medical conclusion.

context_apis.description: Speech-activity intervals without transcript content.
limitations: Activity only; transcript unavailable.

context_apis.description: Non-speech acoustic event candidates from the microphone array.
limitations: Event type is candidate-level only.

context_apis.description: High-energy impact sound candidates from microphone summaries.
limitations: Impact does not imply injury or a fall.

context_apis.description: Restricted distress keyword candidates without transcript disclosure.
limitations: Keyword indicators only; no transcript exposure.

context_apis.description: Sound level summaries and coarse room-noise states.
limitations: Not a speech transcript.

context_apis.description: Coarse source-zone estimates from microphone-array summaries.
limitations: Coarse zones only; not an exact person location.

context_apis.description: Low-risk metadata about microphone coverage and constraints.
limitations: Metadata only.

context_apis.description: Canonical general lookup over supported derived-context packets.
limitations: Cannot invent unavailable evidence.

context_apis.description: Canonical event endpoint for derived event packets.
limitations: Backed by camera and microphone derived events only.

context_apis.description: Canonical bounded context retrieval over derived packets.
limitations: Returns only retained derived packets.

context_apis.description: Restricted raw video reference API retained only to test privacy blocking.
limitations: Not selectable in default TeLLMe planning.

context_apis.description: Restricted raw audio reference API retained only to test privacy blocking.
limitations: Not selectable in default TeLLMe planning.

notes: Default planning must prefer derived context over restricted raw access.
No face recognition, persistent identity, speaker identification, unrestricted transcription, or medical diagnosis.
A single weak modality cannot justify certainty claims.

sensors.description: Doorway camera producing privacy-bounded entry, exit, occupancy, and anonymous track context.
limitations: Anonymous tracks only; no face recognition.
Cannot verify events outside the doorway field of view.
sensors.orientation: Toward the doorway and entry corridor

sensors.description: Room-overview camera producing anonymous occupancy and posture/event candidate context.
limitations: Occlusion from furniture can hide low-floor events.
Posture signals are candidate-level only.
sensors.orientation: Toward the room center and seating area

sensors.description: Ceiling microphone array exposing speech-activity, impact-sound, and acoustic-event context without identity or unrestricted transcription.
limitations: Source localization is coarse.
Overlapping speech reduces reliability.
HVAC noise can affect event confidence.
Cannot establish visual identity.

sensors.description: Future radar integration point retained for extensibility.
limitations: Sensor offline in this primary mock room.

sensors.description: Future Wi-Fi presence integration point retained for extensibility.
limitations: Sensor offline in this primary mock room.

safety_caveats: This is a stub only; TraceFix-main is not invoked in V0.
Real TraceFix multi-agent execution is not integrated yet.
LLM reasoning is audit-only; validators and deterministic guardrails remain authoritative.
Mock CityOS structured context may be incomplete.
Confidence must remain bounded by available evidence.
Do not request raw sensor access, identity claims, unrestricted transcription, or medical diagnosis.
Do not request raw sensor access.
Do not identify a person, diagnose injury, or infer unsupported behavior.

application_goal.failure_condition: Return insufficient_evidence or escalate when the structured context is inadequate.
application_goal.success_condition: Return a privacy-bounded answer packet with confidence and evidence refs.

caveat_requirements: A stronger answer was not produced because the bounded evidence was insufficient.

metric_requirements.description: What the system could establish, if anything.
What evidence was missing or insufficient.
Which harness or modality failed, if safe to disclose.

evidence_card_requirements.primary_question: Could the system answer this from the available evidence?
provenance_requirements: List which expected packets were missing or empty.
summary_requirements: State what could and could not be determined; do not fabricate confidence.

Produce a validated meeting-readiness decision with supporting evidence.
